decisions.decision: Use Gumroad Product ID (not permalink) as the product_id in license verify API calls
decisions.rationale: Gumroad UI explicitly says 'Use your product ID to verify licenses through the API' and shows the base64 ID

decisions.decision: Try all 3 products when verifying a key — user doesn't specify which pack they bought
decisions.rationale: Simpler UX — single key input, server tries each product until one matches

decisions.decision: Check uses===0 before incrementing, then check uses===1 after — prevents double redemption
decisions.rationale: Gumroad has no separate mark-as-used endpoint; increment_uses_count=true on verify is the mechanism

next_action: User creates 25 and 50 credit Gumroad products, then pastes Product IDs + buy URLs here. Then set 6 env vars in .env.local and Vercel dashboard.
context_notes: Billing fully migrated from Whop to Gumroad in code. 10-credit product already created on Gumroad (Product ID: tYtvc16VQuecUnFp54Szww==, permalink: wmmnhz).
